title: Citrusy Crumbly Light German Poached Oreos
description: A light and refreshing German-style poaching infused with citrus zest, featuring low-calorie-friendly Oreo cream biscuits, making it an ideal snack or dessert option.
instructions: Gently simmer the heavy cream, sour cream, lemon juice, and freshly grated orange zest in a saucepan over low heat for about 5 minutes.
Stir in the low-calorie sugar substitute until fully dissolved.
Pour the mixture into a large mixing bowl or container. Allow it to cool slightly before adding crushed Oreo cookies gently using a spoon or spatula.
Mix thoroughly until the mixture reaches a crumbly consistency that can be spread evenly.
Transfer the mixture to serving dishes, garnish with extra citrus zest and finely chopped Oreo cookies if desired.
